videos.title: FIS WC in Idre 2021_WC 1&2
videos.description:
A compilation of the WC races in Speedski in Idre 2021. Simon Billy (FRA) taking the podium in the overall World Cup as did Britta Backlund (SWE) 
An extensive video with, speeds, results and action from two days of speed in "Chocken", the steepest track in northern europe.

videos.title: Epic Sprint Finish! Myhlback vs Wiig – Blink 2025 Classic Showdown / lysebotn opp
videos.description:
The Blink Festival 2025 continues with an epic 50km classic-style roller ski race through the dramatic Norwegian landscape. After a tactical battle and an unbelievable sprint finish, Alvar Myhlback takes the win, edging out Sivert Wiig by the narrowest of margins. Einar Kalland-Olsen claims third, while Irish skier Thomas Westgård and Johan Hoel round out the top five.
Don’t miss this thrilling race recap – hit like and subscribe for more ski racing action!

videos.title: Reece Howden scores Gold in Ski Cross at Idre Fjall
videos.description:
Cultus Lake, BC's Reece Howden captured his third career World Cup ski cross win, and second victory on Saturday, January 23, 2021, at Idre Fjäll, Sweden.
